checkout.validation: Please fill in company name, email, address and city
checkout.validationDelivery: Please fill in the delivery address and city

vies.viesInvalid: VAT number could not be verified via VIES
vies.viesUnavailable: VIES verification is temporarily unavailable — try again shortly
vies.viesStillChecking: Please wait for VAT verification to complete before continuing.
vies.concurrentReq: VIES service is currently overloaded (maximum number of concurrent requests reached). This error (MS_MAX_CONCURRENT_REQ) occurs frequently, especially for French (FR) VAT numbers due to high traffic on the national system. Please try again in a few minutes. You can also validate manually via the official VIES portal or batch tool if needed.

error.canceledMessage: Your checkout was canceled. Your cart is still here — feel free to try again.

alert.viesUnavailable: VIES verification is temporarily unavailable — try again shortly
alert.viesStillChecking: Please wait for VAT verification to complete before continuing.
